title: Paying Students and Other Trainees Using Grants — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-06-08 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Paying Students and Other Trainees Using Grants' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Walks through the compliant mechanisms for paying student researchers and trainees from sponsored funds (stipends, hourly wages, scholarships, fellowships).
